# Task: grove serve explore mode — exclusive surface (healthy) / structural fallback (unhealthy)

> Task ID: GROVE-S02-T04
> Sprint: [GROVE-S02](../INDEX.md)
> Status: 📝 draft
> Estimate: M

## Description

grove serve gains a mode: with mcp-llm config present (or explicit flag) AND provider healthy at startup, tools/list returns exactly one tool: explore (mcp__grove__explore). If the startup health probe FAILS, serve falls back to the standard 7-tool structural surface (identical to --as mcp) with a descriptive stderr note — never a dead server. Mid-session provider connection error returns a recoverable isError on the explore call (typed ProviderDown from T03); server stays up. Default-mode serve byte-identical — existing tests/cli.rs MCP cases and smoke test pass unchanged. New deterministic integration case: explore mode + unreachable provider surfaces the 7 structural tools.
